hero.art_prompt: Ishaan, an 18 year old Indian boy, confident and hopeful, choosing a business path on a laptop, bright modern home, aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Ishaan knew he wanted business, but not the how.
panels.img_prompt: Ishaan, 18, thoughtful in front of a laptop, imagining different business career paths, curious and a little unsure, modern home.

panels.narration: Too many colleges, electives and unclear costs.
panels.img_prompt: Ishaan looking overwhelmed by many open browser options and brochures, rubbing his head, cluttered desk, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a clear, affordable online BBA.
panels.img_prompt: Ishaan smiling with clarity at a laptop showing a clean BBA page with clear electives, warm bright home.

panels.narration: He chose an elective and started with guidance.
panels.img_prompt: Ishaan confidently beginning his first online lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, determined and happy, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: Why Start Your BBA Here
points: Choose from 5 industry electives: Finance, Marketing, HR, Digital Marketing, Data Science & AI.
Study 100% online, anytime, from anywhere. No campus, no commute.
Real AI tools, included micro-credentials and mentor support from semester 1.

testimonials.name: Ishaan Nair
testimonials.quote: I knew I wanted business but not the details. The clear electives and guidance made my choice easy.

testimonials.name: Tanvi Shah
testimonials.quote: Being able to pick my elective meant the degree actually matched the career I wanted.

testimonials.name: Aditya Kumar
testimonials.quote: Learning real AI tools from the first semester made me job-ready, not just degree-ready.

testimonials.name: Pooja Reddy
testimonials.quote: A recognised BBA, learned online at my pace. It opened the first door in my career.

facts.v: 100% online, learn anytime with weekend live classes
₹45,000/year (₹50,000 for Digital Mktg & Data Sci + AI)
